args: TOKEN="${LAZYWEB_MCP_TOKEN:-}"; if [ -z "$TOKEN" ] && [ -f "$HOME/.lazyweb/lazyweb_mcp_token" ]; then TOKEN="$(cat "$HOME/.lazyweb/lazyweb_mcp_token")"; fi; if [ -z "$TOKEN" ] && [ -f "$HOME/.codex/lazyweb_mcp_token" ]; then TOKEN="$(cat "$HOME/.codex/lazyweb_mcp_token")"; fi; exec npx -y mcp-remote@0.1.38 https://www.lazyweb.com/mcp --header "Authorization: Bearer $TOKEN" --transport http-first --silent
